SELECT value, ceil(value) AS rounded_up FROM test_ceil;
SELECT ceil(ABS(value)) AS rounded_up FROM test_ceil WHERE value < 0;
SELECT ceil(value) AS rounded_up FROM (SELECT value FROM test_ceil WHERE value < 5) AS subquery;
SELECT a.val, ceil(a.val) AS rounded_up, b.value FROM additional_vals AS a JOIN test_ceil AS b ON ceil(a.val) = ceil(b.value);
SELECT ceil(SUM(value)) FROM (SELECT value FROM test_ceil WHERE value > 0) AS positive_values;
SELECT ceil(COALESCE(MIN(value), 0)) FROM test_ceil WHERE value IS NOT NULL;
